title: Gymstack: UK Supplement Marketplace on Shopify
summary: Built and scaled Gymstack — a curated Shopify marketplace hosting 300+ supplement brands — through category-led merchandising, promotional mechanics, and an evidence-based content hub.
cardSummary: Curated Shopify marketplace with 300+ supplement brands, category merchandising, and an SEO content hub.
challenge: The UK supplement market is fragmented across hundreds of niche brands with inconsistent PDP quality, weak discoverability, and low trust signals. Gymstack needed a marketplace experience that simplified product discovery, supported multi-brand promotions, and converted health-conscious shoppers without sacrificing margin.
strategy: Positioned Gymstack as the supplement marketplace with dual discovery paths — shop by brand and shop by category. Homepage merchandising anchored on best sellers and seasonal campaigns; a content programme captured high-intent search traffic. Promotional architecture lifted AOV while protecting brand equity.
implementation: Launched Shopify storefront with 300+ curated brands across sports nutrition, health & wellness, and food & drink
Built category pill navigation and best-seller modules to surface high-velocity SKUs above the fold
Deployed promotional campaigns including Grenade 3-for-2, flash sale overlays, and £75 free UK delivery threshold
Established 'Brand of the Month' and seasonal hero rotations to drive discovery across the catalogue
Created evidence-based blog hub with topic filters (collagen, vitamin D, electrolytes) for SEO and trust
Integrated voice search, multi-language support, and affiliate/athlete programme landing pages
